text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Bravo! I have recognized your insatiable pursuit
of ever greater speed!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
See that you continue your endeavors in earnest! I
now take my leave!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's apparently pleased with the way we're
conducting our practice sessions.
